summary: Detailed line-by-line source-target comparison performed. E.Y. header properly localized. All dialogue and narrative translated accurately. Key characters (Harry, Hermione, Draco, Quirrell, Snape) properly rendered. Word count ratio 1.32 (5,436 EN words to 7,178 VI words) consistent with normal EN→VI expansion. No omission, mistranslation, untranslated English, MT artifacts, or terminology issues found.
